title: codia spatulata
intro: Codia spatulata, also known as the spathic codia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Clusiaceae. Codia spatulata has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. It can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
